title: ModelEngine-Group/nexent
description: Nexent is a zero-code platform for auto-generating production-grade AI agents using Harness Engineering principles — unified tools, skills, memory, and orchestration with built-in constraints, feedback loops, and control planes.

title: bgdnvk/clanker

title: affaan-m/everything-claude-code

title: bytedance/deer-flow
description: An open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.

title: Claude Codeのトークン消費が突然10倍になる原因と、hookで防ぐ実践的な方法
Anthropic公式「Claude Codeベストプラクティス」を700時間使った非エンジニアが読んで気づいた7つのこと
Claude Code × n8n × Colab × Playwright × Antigravity——「阿修羅アーキテクチャ」で何ができるようになったか
n8n MCPを繋いだら、ワークフローの「作る→直す→テストする」がターミナルから出なくなった
Microsoft 365 Copilot MCPコネクタGA完全ガイド — 設定・仕組み・企業展開
Mimosa Framework: Toward Evolving Multi-Agent Systems for Scientific Research
description: Current Autonomous Scientific Research (ASR) systems, despite leveraging large language models (LLMs) and agentic architectures, remain constrained by fixed workflows and toolsets that prevent adaptation to evolving tasks and environments. We introduce Mimosa, an evolving multi-agent framework that automatically synthesizes task-specific multi-agent workflows and iteratively refines them through e
authors: Martin Legrand, Tao Jiang, Matthieu Feraud
